note: The per-tenant composition pipeline. An idea enters at genesis; each stage is owned by exactly one organ (by registry id); the cortex is cross-cutting (it feeds every stage, it is not a stage). input/output are the contract tokens documented in composition/CONTRACTS.md. The conductor (bin/compose.mjs) resolves each stage.organ against registry.json and prints the plan; it is DRY-RUN ONLY — executing the organs end-to-end is I2.

stages.title: Mint the brand
downstream_effects: Seeds the canonical brand vocabulary consumed by taste, build, and ops
Establishes the initial brand docs surface later stages refine

stages.title: Set the taste
downstream_effects: Turns brand intent into structured visual and build constraints
Seeds the reusable acceptance gates downstream stages should preserve

stages.title: Build on-brand
downstream_effects: Materializes the artifact and proof surface ops carries into distribution
Promotes seeded plans into executable assets and implementation docs

stages.title: Operate + GTM
downstream_effects: Feeds live distribution outcomes and market feedback back into the cortex
Converts the built artifact into a running business operating state

crosscutting.title: Aesthetic memory
crosscutting.note: the 1024-dim NIM memory; learns across stages and across tenants
